articles.summary: 제로베이스원이 5인 체제로 변경되면서 새로운 팀 로고를 공개했습니다.

articles.title: “상승과 확장의 메시지” 제로베이스원, 5인 체제 첫 시그니처 로고 리뉴얼 - 스포츠동아
articles.summary: 제로베이스원이 5인 체제로 변경되면서 상승과 확장의 메시지를 담은 새로운 시그니처 로고로 리뉴얼했습니다.

articles.title: '5인조 재편' 제로베이스원, 로고 리뉴얼…결속력 강조 - 네이트
articles.summary: 제로베이스원이 5인조 재편과 함께 로고를 리뉴얼했습니다. 새로운 로고를 통해 그룹의 결속력을 강조하려는 의도로 보입니다.

articles.title: Nonprofit European Crypto Initiative gets Ethereum-focused rebrand - dlnews.com
articles.summary: European Crypto Initiative nonprofit organization underwent a rebrand with a focus on Ethereum. The organization changed its brand identity to better align with Ethereum-focused initiatives.

articles.title: Meta is rebranding employee titles and roles as the company tells employees in memo: Goal is to drive a s - The Times of India
articles.summary: Meta is rebranding employee titles and roles across the company as part of internal restructuring. The rebranding of job titles and organizational roles aims to drive specific strategic goals within the company.

articles.title: Cava Bought This Cult-Favorite Chain Before Rebranding All Of Its Locations - Daily Meal
articles.summary: Cava acquired a cult-favorite restaurant chain and subsequently rebranded all of its locations under the Cava brand. The rebranding involved converting the acquired chain's locations to match Cava's brand identity.

articles.title: Casey’s has started rebranding CEFCO locations in Florida - CSP Daily News
articles.summary: Casey's convenience store chain is rebranding CEFCO locations in Florida to Casey's branding. The company is converting the acquired CEFCO stores to maintain brand consistency across their expanding footprint.

articles.title: Four Seasons Hotel Kyoto Redefines Luxury with the Rebranding of The Lounge & Bar to SEY Offering Signature Cocktails and Seasonal Japanese-Inspired Bites - travelandtourworld.com
articles.summary: Four Seasons Hotel Kyoto rebranded The Lounge & Bar to "SEY," transforming it into a venue offering signature cocktails and seasonal Japanese-inspired bites. The rebrand appears to be part of redefining their luxury hospitality experience.

articles.title: With A Rebrand & Clean-Label Push, Can Beyond Meat Revive US Interest in Plant Protein? - Green Queen Media
articles.summary: Beyond Meat is undergoing a rebrand alongside a clean-label push to revive US consumer interest in plant-based protein products. The rebrand is part of their strategy to reinvigorate the plant protein market.

articles.title: Ozempic trademark clash forces DRL to offer rebranding of Olymviq as Olymra - Business Standard
articles.summary: DRL (Dr. Reddy's Laboratories) was forced to rebrand their product from "Olymviq" to "Olymra" due to a trademark clash with Ozempic. The rebranding was a legal requirement to resolve the trademark conflict.

articles.title: NGOBOX Rebrands as One Purpos Openings, Marking a Strategic Shift Toward Structured Talent and Opportunity Solutions - Business Wire India
articles.summary: NGOBOX has rebranded to One Purpos Openings, representing a strategic shift toward structured talent and opportunity solutions. The rebrand marks a change in company name and strategic positioning in the talent solutions space.

articles.title: Nutri Group rebrands as Lovo; Renos continue at egg processing plant in Steinbach - Winnipeg Free Press
articles.summary: Nutri Group has rebranded with a new company name, changing to Lovo. The rebrand coincides with ongoing renovations at their egg processing plant in Steinbach.

articles.title: Aventus Energy rebrands as part of Global group - TheBusinessDesk.com
articles.summary: Aventus Energy has undergone a rebrand as part of becoming part of a Global group. The rebrand appears to be connected to the company's integration into a larger corporate structure.

articles.title: Confusion as SpaceX Rebrands Some Starlink Satellite Broadband Kit - ISPreview UK
articles.summary: SpaceX is rebranding some of its Starlink satellite broadband kit, though the specific changes and reasons are unclear from the title alone. The rebrand appears to be causing some confusion among users or in the market.

articles.title: After 28 years, Beras Cap Masjid rebrands as Beras Cap Astana | Sinar Daily - Sinar Daily
articles.summary: Beras Cap Masjid is rebranding to Beras Cap Astana after 28 years of operation. This appears to be a complete name change for the rice brand.

articles.title: A.G. Barr rebrands IRN-BRU XTRA as IRN-BRU Zero in major UK push - Grocery Gazette
articles.summary: A.G. Barr is rebranding IRN-BRU XTRA as IRN-BRU Zero as part of a major UK market push. The company is changing the product name of their sugar-free IRN-BRU variant.

articles.title: Etsy Brand Refresh Signals Shift from Transaction to Connection - Little Black Book | LBBOnline
articles.summary: Etsy has undergone a brand refresh that signals the company's strategic shift from focusing on transactions to emphasizing connections. The rebrand reflects a change in brand positioning and messaging.

articles.title: CNBC unveils new logo, refreshes brand identity across India network - Storyboard18
articles.summary: CNBC has unveiled a new logo and refreshed its brand identity across its India network. The changes include visual identity updates with a new logo design.
